arts.ttl: Parma’s Midfield Quest: Targeting Bologna’s Fabbian
arts.sum: Parma are looking for a midfield reinforcement with just one week remaining in the January transfer window. The club has set its sights on Giovanni Fabbian from Bologna, though the transfer is far from certain. The post Parma’s Midfield Quest: Targeting Bologna’s Fabbian appeared first on FootItalia.com.
